text.title: AI Plugin Ecosystem (Figma) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-plugin-ecosystem.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the task a fit for plugin automation (vs. agent pre/post or manual)?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — manual work cheaper than plugin setup
REJECT — plugin violates data privacy constraints
PRECONDITION — set styles before evaluating plugin
ADOPT — record decision with version pin + audit cadence
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
